_comment: All user-facing strings. Voice: gentle, plain English, never condescending. Reading age ~8th grade. No jargon (avoid 'system prompt', 'context window', 'fine-tune'). Reassuring without being saccharine. When in doubt, write it the way you'd say it to your aunt.

site.title: ChatPrep — Personalize ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini
site.tagline: Set up AI to work the way you think.
site.footer_privacy: Nothing you type leaves your browser. No accounts. No tracking.

intro.heading: What do you mostly want AI to help with?
intro.subhead: Pick the one that fits best — we'll build instructions you can paste into ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini. Takes about 2 minutes. No account.
intro.cta_resume: Pick up where you left off

preview.label: Live preview
preview.placeholder: Pick a topic to see your template start to take shape.
preview.tab_help: Switch tabs to see how the template looks for each AI.

step1._comment: Step 1 question is now embedded directly in the homepage (intro). These options drive that tile grid.
step1.heading: What do you mostly want AI to help with?
step1.subhead: Pick the one that fits best. You can change it later.

options.label: Writing
options.hint: Emails, essays, reports — anything with words.

options.label: Learning
options.hint: Studying, understanding new topics, getting tutored.

options.label: Coding
options.hint: Writing, debugging, or learning to code.

options.label: Creative
options.hint: Stories, art ideas, music, poems, brainstorming.

step1.error_required: Please pick one to continue. You can change it later.

step2.heading: How comfortable are you with AI tools?
step2.subhead: Be honest — there's no wrong answer. We'll match the explanations to wherever you're at.

options.label: I've tried it a few times

step2.error_required: Please pick the one that fits best.

step3.heading: A little about you
step3.subhead: Helps the AI talk to you in a way that fits your life. We don't ask for your name, employer, or anything that could identify you. Tap a suggestion below any field, or type your own. Skip any field you'd rather not answer.
step3.country_why: So measurements, dates, and references make sense for your country — recipes in cups vs grams, dates as MM/DD vs DD/MM, that kind of thing.
step3.industry_label: What kind of work do you do?
step3.industry_why: Tells the AI what world you're in, so it can use examples and language that fit. "Healthcare" or "retired" is enough — no need for company names.
step3.industry_placeholder: Pick or type — e.g. healthcare, education, retail
step3.role_why: Helps the AI understand what's important to you. Plain words like "teacher," "parent," "manager," "engineer."
step3.role_placeholder: Pick or type — e.g. teacher, manager, parent
step3.hobbies_why: If you mention these, the AI can use them in examples — explaining math through cooking, writing tips through your favorite books, etc. Tap a chip to add; tap again to remove.
step3.detail_label: How much detail do you want the AI to know about you?

detail_options.label: Lots of detail
detail_options.hint: More personal answers, but more for you to share.

step4.heading: Anything you want the AI to avoid?
step4.subhead: Pet peeves, things that bug you, or just preferences. Skip if you don't have any.

options.label: Show worked examples for math or code
Don't pretend to have personal experiences

output.heading: Here's what to paste.
output.subhead: We've made three versions — one for each of the big AI services. Pick the tab for the one you use, hit Copy, and paste it into the right spot. (Don't use any of these yet? See the "Why three formats?" note below.)
output.char_warning: We trimmed a few optional bits to fit. The most important parts are still there.
output.verified_stamp: Last verified: {date}. AI services change — check our notes if something looks off.
output.why_three_body: Each service has its own quirks: ChatGPT splits your instructions into two boxes; Claude takes one long block; Gemini has a strict length limit. Same instructions underneath — just packaged differently. If you don't use any of these yet, ChatGPT is the easiest to start with — it has a free version at chatgpt.com.

errors.generic: Something didn't work. Try again, and if it keeps happening, please tell us at the link in the footer.
errors.storage_blocked: Your browser is blocking the temporary storage we use to remember your answers between steps. The wizard still works — but if you refresh the page, you'll need to start over.
errors.clipboard_failed: Couldn't copy automatically. Select the text below and copy it manually.

footer.made_by: Made by a person, not a company.
